content_blocks.text: All research tools (spawn, web_fetch, web_search) are denied. I can't retrieve live weather data. I'll still attempt to write weather.txt documenting the outcome, so there's a record.

input.content:
Weather report — could not be generated

Date/time of attempt: 2026-01-01 (scheduled task, UTC)

Status: NO WEATHER DATA AVAILABLE.

Reason:
This task ran unattended (no human present to approve actions). Every tool
required to gather weather information was denied by policy:
  - spawn_agent (to delegate the research) — denied
  - web_fetch (IP geolocation via ipinfo.io / ip-api.com) — denied
  - web_fetch (Open-Meteo forecast API) — denied
  - web_search (weather lookup) — denied

As a result, neither the current location nor the weather could be determined.

To get a real report, re-run this task in an attended session where network/
spawn tools can be approved, or grant the scheduled task standing approval for
web_search / web_fetch (and optionally spawn_agent).
